title: Rakvere, Lääne-Viru County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rakvere, Lääne-Viru County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rakvere is a city in Lääne-Viru County with a population of 15,000. A historic town in northern Estonia, known for the Rakvere Castle, the unique Tarvas bull sculpture, and a vibrant cultural and theater scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
